title: Machine Learning Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — math, statistics and programming foundations, data preprocessing and feature engineering, core ML concepts, supervised and unsupervised learning, ensembles, evaluation, neural networks and deep learning, specialized domains, MLOps and advanced research.

stages.title: Mathematics for Machine Learning
stages.summary: Linear algebra, calculus, probability, statistics and optimization.

nodes.title: Linear Algebra
nodes.description: Vectors, matrices, decompositions and the math of data.

nodes.title: Calculus
nodes.description: Derivatives, gradients and the math behind optimization.

nodes.title: Probability
nodes.description: Random variables, distributions and Bayesian reasoning.

nodes.title: Statistics
nodes.description: Descriptive and inferential statistics for data analysis.

nodes.title: Mathematical Optimization
nodes.description: Objective functions, convexity and numerical optimization.

nodes.title: Information Theory
nodes.description: Entropy and divergence measures used throughout ML.

stages.title: Programming & Tooling for ML
stages.summary: Python, NumPy, Pandas, visualization, data access and dev workflow.

nodes.title: Python for Machine Learning
nodes.description: Core and intermediate Python plus the ML tooling ecosystem.

nodes.title: NumPy
nodes.description: N-dimensional arrays and vectorized numerical computing.

nodes.title: Pandas
nodes.description: Tabular data structures, wrangling and time series.

nodes.title: Scientific Computing
nodes.description: SciPy and symbolic math for numerical work.

nodes.title: Data Visualization
nodes.description: Plotting libraries and visual communication best practices.

nodes.title: Data Access & Storage
nodes.description: Databases, APIs, web scraping and data file formats.

nodes.title: Development Workflow
nodes.description: Version control, command line, code quality and reproducibility.

nodes.title: ML Libraries
nodes.description: Scikit-learn, gradient boosting libraries and the ML ecosystem.

stages.title: Data Preprocessing & Wrangling
stages.summary: Collecting, cleaning, transforming, balancing and splitting data.

nodes.title: Data Collection & Types
nodes.description: Data sources, data types and assessing data quality.

nodes.title: Data Cleaning
nodes.description: Missing values, outliers, duplicates and error correction.

nodes.title: Data Transformation
nodes.description: Scaling, encoding and mathematical transforms of features.

nodes.title: Handling Imbalanced Data
nodes.description: Resampling, algorithmic and evaluation strategies for class imbalance.

nodes.title: Data Splitting
nodes.description: Train/validation/test splits and avoiding data leakage.

nodes.title: Preprocessing Special Data Types
nodes.description: Text, image, time series and audio preprocessing fundamentals.

stages.title: EDA & Feature Engineering
stages.summary: Exploring data and creating, selecting and reducing features.

nodes.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
nodes.description: Understanding data through univariate, bivariate and multivariate analysis.

nodes.title: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Creating and transforming features to improve model performance.

nodes.title: Feature Selection
nodes.description: Filter, wrapper and embedded methods to select informative features.

nodes.title: Dimensionality Reduction
nodes.description: Linear and nonlinear techniques to reduce feature dimensionality.

nodes.title: Feature Engineering Workflow
nodes.description: Pipelines, automation and reuse of engineered features.

stages.title: Core ML Concepts
stages.summary: Fundamentals, workflow, bias-variance, losses, regularization and optimization.

nodes.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
nodes.description: What ML is, types of learning, problem types and terminology.

nodes.title: The ML Workflow
nodes.description: The end-to-end lifecycle and the model training process.

nodes.title: Bias-Variance Tradeoff
nodes.description: Bias, variance, overfitting, underfitting and generalization.

nodes.title: Loss & Cost Functions
nodes.description: Objectives that quantify and drive model learning.

nodes.title: Regularization
nodes.description: Techniques that control complexity and reduce overfitting.

nodes.title: Optimization & Training
nodes.description: Gradient descent, learning rates, optimizers and convergence.

nodes.title: Statistical Learning Theory
nodes.description: PAC learning, VC dimension and generalization bounds.

stages.title: Supervised Learning — Regression
stages.summary: Linear, polynomial, regularized, generalized and nonlinear regression.

nodes.title: Linear Regression
nodes.description: Simple and multiple linear regression, assumptions and diagnostics.

nodes.title: Polynomial & Spline Regression
nodes.description: Modeling nonlinear relationships with polynomials and splines.

nodes.title: Regularized Regression
nodes.description: Ridge, Lasso and Elastic Net for controlling overfitting.

nodes.title: Generalized Linear Models
nodes.description: Link functions, count regression and robust regression.

nodes.title: Nonlinear Regression Algorithms
nodes.description: SVR, tree-based, instance-based and Gaussian process regression.

nodes.title: Regression Model Evaluation
nodes.description: Metrics, residual analysis and validation for regression.

stages.title: Supervised Learning — Classification
stages.summary: Logistic regression, KNN, Naive Bayes, SVM, trees and discriminant analysis.

nodes.title: Logistic Regression
nodes.description: Binary, multiclass and regularized logistic regression.

nodes.title: K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)
nodes.description: Instance-based classification by neighborhood voting.

nodes.title: Naive Bayes
nodes.description: Probabilistic classifiers based on Bayes theorem.

nodes.title: Support Vector Machines (SVM)
nodes.description: Margin-based classifiers and the kernel trick.

nodes.title: Decision Trees
nodes.description: Tree-based classifiers, splitting criteria and pruning.

nodes.title: Discriminant Analysis
nodes.description: Linear and quadratic discriminant analysis classifiers.

nodes.title: Multiclass & Multilabel Classification
nodes.description: Strategies for multiple classes and multiple labels.

stages.title: Ensemble Methods
stages.summary: Bagging, random forests, boosting, stacking and voting.

nodes.title: Ensemble Fundamentals
nodes.description: Why ensembles work and how predictions are combined.

nodes.title: Bagging
nodes.description: Bootstrap aggregation to reduce variance.

nodes.title: Random Forests
nodes.description: Bagged trees with feature randomness.

nodes.title: Boosting
nodes.description: Sequential weak learners: AdaBoost, GBM and gradient boosting libraries.

nodes.title: Stacking & Blending
nodes.description: Combining diverse models with a meta-learner.

nodes.title: Voting Ensembles
nodes.description: Hard, soft and weighted voting across models.

nodes.title: Ensemble Considerations
nodes.description: Trade-offs, cost and when to use ensembles.

stages.title: Unsupervised Learning
stages.summary: Clustering, association rules, anomaly detection and density estimation.

nodes.title: Clustering Fundamentals
nodes.description: Core clustering concepts, similarity measures and cluster types.

nodes.title: Partitional Clustering
nodes.description: K-Means, K-Medoids and their variants.

nodes.title: Hierarchical Clustering
nodes.description: Agglomerative and divisive clustering with dendrograms.

nodes.title: Density-Based Clustering
nodes.description: DBSCAN, OPTICS, HDBSCAN and Mean-Shift.

nodes.title: Model-Based Clustering
nodes.description: Gaussian Mixture Models and the EM algorithm.

nodes.title: Association Rule Learning
nodes.description: Frequent itemsets and rule mining algorithms.

nodes.title: Anomaly Detection
nodes.description: Statistical, proximity-based and model-based outlier detection.

nodes.title: Clustering Evaluation
nodes.description: Internal and external validation metrics for clusters.

nodes.title: Advanced Clustering
nodes.description: Spectral, affinity propagation, BIRCH and self-organizing maps.

nodes.title: Topic Modeling
nodes.description: Discovering latent topics in document collections.

stages.title: Model Evaluation & Selection
stages.summary: Metrics, cross-validation, hyperparameter tuning and model selection.

nodes.title: Classification Metrics
nodes.description: Confusion matrix, precision/recall, ROC/AUC and advanced metrics.

nodes.title: Ranking & Recommendation Metrics
nodes.description: Metrics for ranking, retrieval and recommendation tasks.

nodes.title: Cross-Validation
nodes.description: Resampling strategies for robust performance estimation.

nodes.title: Hyperparameter Tuning
nodes.description: Search strategies, tools and best practices for tuning.

nodes.title: Model Selection
nodes.description: Choosing and comparing models with sound criteria.

nodes.title: Validation & Error Analysis
nodes.description: Diagnostic curves, error analysis and probability calibration.

stages.title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning Foundations
stages.summary: Perceptrons, activations, backprop, training and frameworks.

nodes.title: Neural Network Basics
nodes.description: Perceptrons, multilayer networks and core components.

nodes.title: Activation Functions
nodes.description: Nonlinearities that give networks expressive power.

nodes.title: Backpropagation
nodes.description: How gradients flow backward to train networks.

nodes.title: Training Neural Networks
nodes.description: Optimization, initialization, batching and normalization.

nodes.title: Regularization in Deep Learning
nodes.description: Dropout, weight decay and other generalization techniques.

nodes.title: Deep Learning Frameworks
nodes.description: PyTorch, TensorFlow/Keras and core framework concepts.

stages.title: Deep Learning Architectures
stages.summary: CNNs, RNNs, autoencoders, transformers, generative and transfer learning.

nodes.title: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs)
nodes.description: Convolutions, pooling, classic architectures and key concepts.

nodes.title: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)
nodes.description: Sequence modeling with RNNs, LSTMs and GRUs.

nodes.title: Autoencoders
nodes.description: Encoder-decoder networks for representation and generation.

nodes.title: Transformers
nodes.description: Attention mechanisms and the transformer architecture.

nodes.title: Generative Deep Models
nodes.description: GANs, diffusion models and other deep generative methods.

nodes.title: Transfer Learning & Pretrained Models
nodes.description: Reusing pretrained models and adapting them to new tasks.

nodes.title: Specialized Neural Architectures
nodes.description: Metric learning, memory-augmented and other novel architectures.

stages.title: Specialized ML Domains
stages.summary: Computer vision, NLP, time series, recommenders, RL and audio.

nodes.title: Computer Vision
nodes.description: Image tasks, detection, segmentation and CV techniques.

nodes.title: Natural Language Processing
nodes.description: NLP tasks, text representation, models and pipelines.

nodes.title: Time Series Analysis
nodes.description: Forecasting with classical and ML-based time series models.

nodes.title: Recommender Systems
nodes.description: Collaborative, content-based and hybrid recommendation.

nodes.title: Reinforcement Learning
nodes.description: Agents, value/policy methods and deep reinforcement learning.

nodes.title: Audio & Speech Processing
nodes.description: Speech recognition, synthesis and audio classification.

nodes.title: Multimodal Learning
nodes.description: Combining vision, language and audio modalities.

nodes.title: Tabular Machine Learning
nodes.description: Best practices and deep learning for tabular data.

stages.title: MLOps & Deployment
stages.summary: Deployment, pipelines, tracking, monitoring, optimization and scaling.

nodes.title: MLOps Fundamentals
nodes.description: What MLOps is, its principles, maturity and roles.

nodes.title: Model Deployment
nodes.description: Deployment patterns, serving, strategies and packaging.

nodes.title: ML Pipelines & Orchestration
nodes.description: Data, training and inference pipelines and their orchestration.

nodes.title: Experiment Tracking & Versioning
nodes.description: Tracking experiments, model registries and data versioning.

nodes.title: Monitoring & Observability
nodes.description: Performance monitoring, drift detection and feedback loops.

nodes.title: Model Optimization for Inference
nodes.description: Compression and acceleration to serve models efficiently.

nodes.title: ML Infrastructure & Scaling
nodes.description: Compute, distributed training, scaling and cost control.

stages.title: Advanced Topics
stages.summary: XAI, AutoML, self/semi-supervised, Bayesian, graph, federated and more.

nodes.title: Interpretability & Explainability (XAI)
nodes.description: Understanding and explaining model predictions.

nodes.title: AutoML
nodes.description: Automating model selection, tuning and architecture search.

nodes.title: Self-Supervised & Semi-Supervised Learning
nodes.description: Learning from unlabeled or partially labeled data.

nodes.title: Bayesian Machine Learning
nodes.description: Bayesian methods, probabilistic programming and uncertainty.

nodes.title: Graph Machine Learning
nodes.description: Graph representations, GNNs and graph tasks.

nodes.title: Federated & Privacy-Preserving Learning
nodes.description: Decentralized training and privacy-preserving techniques.

nodes.title: Continual, Online & Meta-Learning
nodes.description: Learning over time, on streams and learning to learn.

nodes.title: Emerging Research Topics
nodes.description: Causal inference, multi-task, neuro-symbolic and quantum ML.

nodes.title: Probabilistic Graphical Models
nodes.description: Bayesian networks, Markov models, HMMs, CRFs and inference.

nodes.title: ML Security & Robustness
nodes.description: Adversarial attacks, defenses and secure ML practices.

stages.title: Career, Ethics & Continuous Learning
stages.summary: Responsible AI, system design, careers and staying current.

nodes.title: Responsible AI & Ethics
nodes.description: Ethics, fairness, transparency and privacy in ML.

nodes.title: ML System Design
nodes.description: Designing end-to-end machine learning systems.

nodes.title: ML Production Best Practices
nodes.description: Testing, technical debt and documentation for ML systems.

nodes.title: Career Development
nodes.description: Career paths, portfolios and interview preparation.

nodes.title: Continuous Learning
nodes.description: Staying current, learning resources and communities.

nodes.title: Practical Wisdom
nodes.description: Pitfalls, debugging and effective collaboration.
